transcript.text:
[Tray full of noodles]
[Preparing today's mukbang]
[Yes, this is exactly what you think it is...]
[Mix it up!]
[But what are those...?]
[A different type of steak tartare...?]
[3 different types of raw meat and bibim noodles mukbang]
Hello everyone
I prepared food that I wanted to eat today
A long time ago, maybe 2~3 years ago?
I had beef tartare with bibimmyun before (cold spicy noodles)
10 packs with 1kg of tartare
They look strange, right? They're different
Brisket on the right
Skirt steak in the middle
And cube beef tartare on this side

Deep-fried oysters here too
Bon appetit
[But...]
I forgot to press "record" again...
I started eating already I keep messing up
[Let's just fuel up]
The egg yolk popped already
The raw brisket is really interesting
Let's try this first
200 grams each for the brisket and cube tartare
600 grams of skirt steak
Total of 1kg
So good
It's been a while It even tastes better than before
This is the black sesame sauce
Dip it like this

It may look like it's not edible raw
But it's really tasty There are certain grades that you can eat raw
The fatty part has a great texture And the meat is really chewy
Delicious
It tastes really great
Skirt steak Dip it over here
This is the best That's why I ordered 600g of this
Bibimmyun with raw skirt steak
That's amazing
[Nod of approval]
The skirt steak has a great texture
It's different than a regular beef tartare
Really meaty
Cubed tartare now
Cut like this
This is also grade A++ Really delicious

[Now for the fried oysters]
I love this so much
Focus
Not working
I give up
Not fishy at all
It's so good
Tasty
With brisket
They usually use rump for steak tartare
But now they use all these other parts to eat raw
Each of them taste different, so I want to try them all
Should I get some ice here?
It'll be better if you cool the noodles down with ice
When I had bibimmyun with steak tartare about 2~3 years ago,
It was just out of the blue

And a lot of people were surprised at that combination
Now this combo is very common even in restaurants
These were hand-torn
This one is as a whole
I left 1 like this
You have to get them in pieces
I had a hard time I didn't know I'd chew for that long
There's a reason why they're served how they're served
Spin it around like this
Stick a piece on it
Yummy
Cube tartare
Everything focuses except for this
Really tasty
So good What is it?
Stick it

This combination is really nice
They go well together
Let's eat it as it is
[Giving some to her clothes]
I have a lot of meat left
I tried balancing it out But I ate a lot of the noodles
Should I mix it with the egg yolk?
Hurry hurry
I wonder how it'll taste
Yum
It gave more flavors on top of sweet and sour
This is just too good
It should taste better warm
Crispy and delicious
Let's dip it here
So good

A lot of meat left here
[She doesn't talk too much when the food is good]
Oysters are in season in the Winter
They're not season, but it's not fishy at all
They are usually fishy when they're not in season
Maybe because it's fried?
Scrape everything up
The camera is reversed (mirror) because...
When I raise this hand and I see that this goes up from my screen, it's uncomfortable to see
So I do it when I do home mukbangs
1 piece at a time
If not, it's just a little too much to chew
Almost done with the noodles, but a lot more meat left
It's good with sesame oil anyway
Forget about the balance now
Let's try to make it focus 1 more time

There
I'll eat this separately
Should I dip the noodles too?
It might taste weird
Drench it
The sauce itself is delicious
I'll save the last one
I don't think I talked much today because the food was so good
The beef tartare and cold noodle combo was great
So everyone should give it a try
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
